name: Georgia O'Keeffe

acts.description: Documented mistreatment and exploitation of studio assistants and domestic employees in later life

behavior_summary: Iconic American modernist who in her later years was documented to have treated assistants and household staff harshly, though the full extent is debated.

notable_works: Cow's Skull: Red, White, and Blue
art.summary: Mother of American modernism. Her flower paintings and New Mexico landscapes are iconic. One of the first major female artists to achieve canonical status.

verdict.blurb: She was often difficult and demanding to those in her employ, which is a fairly human failing. Her flowers are still extraordinary. This one barely clears the bar for inclusion — but the bar exists for a reason.
